Terra (www.terra.com) is a global digital media company and bilingual content producer with a presence in 19 countries, including the United States where it serves the growing Hispanic community and Spain in Europe. Focusing on lifestyle, entertainment, sports and news, Terra creates an interactive user experience for millions of U.S. Hispanics and provides solutions for advertisers seeking exposure among this key demographic. In Latin America, Terra is the regionâ€™s leading Internet company, with 105 million unique visitors per month.
